zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Verney於大約1385年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾白費爾德時，她的父親William de Verney43歲，母親Elizabeth de Bereham40歲。她於1399年之前與John d'Anvers II結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1423年之前在英國奧可福爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Verney于大约1385年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾白費爾德时，她的父亲William de Verney43岁，母亲Elizabeth de Bereham40岁。她于1399年之前与John d'Anvers II结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1423年之前在英国奧可福爾。

nameMeanings.name: Verney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Varney
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from a French place called Vernay, probably chiefly Saint-Paul-de-Vernay (Calvados). The placename comes from a derivative of Gaulish verno- ‘alder’ + the locative suffix -acum.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Verney was born about 1385, in Byfield, Northamptonshire, England, her father, William de Verney, was 43 and her mother, Elizabeth de Bereham, was 40. She married John d'Anvers II before 1399. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died before 1423, in Oxfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Verney est née environ 1385, à Byfield, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, William de Verney, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Bereham, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé John d'Anvers II avant 1399. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée avant 1423, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Verney um 1385 in Byfield, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Verney 43 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth de Bereham 40. Sie hat vor 1399 John d'Anvers II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb vor 1423 in Oxfordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Verney è nata il circa 1385 nel Byfield, Northamptonshire, England, sua padre, William de Verney, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth de Bereham, aveva 40 anni. Lei sposato John d'Anvers II prima del 1399. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì prima del 1423, nel Oxfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Verneyが約1385年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブイフィールドで生まれた時，父William de Verneyは43歳，母Elizabeth de Berehamは40歳であった。1399年以前にJohn d'Anvers IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1423年以前にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Verney(이)가 대략 1385년 영국 노르섬프토실르 비필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Verney(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth de Bereham(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 1399년 이전 John d'Anvers II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1423년 이전 영국 스퍼드실르에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Verney nasceu aproximadamente 1385, em Byfield, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Verney, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Bereham, tinha 40 anos. Ela casou-se com John d'Anvers II antes 1399. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu antes 1423, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Verney родилась около 1385 г. в местности бифиелд, нортамптоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Verney было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Bereham, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John d'Anvers II перед 1399 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла перед 1423 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия.

sm.Abt 1385–Bef 1423: e tusa o le 1385–a'e le'I oo le 1423

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Verney nació aproximadamente 1385, en Byfield, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Verney, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Elizabeth de Bereham, tenía 40 años. Se casó con John d'Anvers II antes de 1399. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió antes de 1423, en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.
